name: Liver Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the liver through a meat chopper (beef liver may be used).
2. Fry the onion in the shortening with the bread crumbs.
3. Combine the liver and the eggs, mixing well.
4. Add the onion and bread crumbs to the mixture. Season to taste.
5. Stir in enough flour (using more than 1/2 cup if necessary) to make a batter stiff enough to drop from a spoon.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into a kettle of hot broth or soup and cover tightly.
7. Cook for 30 minutes, shaking the pan frequently to prevent sticking.
